label: Financial Services Object Registry
notes: Canonical Financial Services object taxonomy. Config-as-data over the DKR ObjectRegistryEntry contract (core/registry/types.ts). object_class 'cartridge_entity' = domain nouns installed as entity_types; registers into 0017 object_registry via metadata.registry_object_class. Universal fields are the inherited Dispatch Object Model (see 0017 + CORE_OBJECT_MODEL).

metadata.notes: Financial Crimes Enforcement Network — the BSA/AML filing authority. SAR/CTR filings are submitted to FinCEN via BSA E-Filing (the prudential regulator — NCUA/FDIC/OCC — examines for BSA compliance).
